title: Conveying tube set with adapters for delivering volatile liquid anesthetics
abstract: Conveying tube set with adapters for delivering volatile liquid anesthetics, comprises: two adapters namely the first adapter (5) playing a role in a delivering outlet tube connecting to a liquid anesthetics bottle; and the second adapter (8) playing a role in a delivering inlet tube connecting to an inlet port of vaporizer. The two mentioned (5, 8) adapters tightly attach anesthetics bottle mouth and inlet port of a vaporizer. The second adapter (8) interlocking the vaporizer's inlet port has two patterns: the first pattern directly attaches to an inlet port of a vaporizer; and the second pattern is further interlocked to the first pattern which is the development of the conveying tube set to adapt to various patterns of inlet ports of the vaporizer with only one set of conveying tube set.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A conveying tube set with adapters for delivering volatile liquid anesthetics comprising a stopper (1); a first joint (4); a first adapter (5); and a conveying tube (7) characterized in that - the stopper (1) having a deep hole at its center playing a role in covering one end of the first joint (4); - the first joint (4) having a cylindrical shape as a whole and a flat annular shape at its middle point, and the other end of the joint (4) interlocks to the conveying tube (7), as well as the said end of the first joint (4) tightly connects to the first adapter (5) having a hole inside; - the conveying tube (7) being a cylindrical tube that tightly connects to one end of the first joint (4); and - a second adapter (8) comprising one end interlocking to the conveying tube (7), wherein the inside of the other end of the adapter (8) attaches and detaches to an anesthetic machine. 2. The conveying tube set according to claim 1, wherein the first adapter (5) has preferably two grooves. 3. The conveying tube set according to claim 1, wherein the conveying tube (7) most suitable for delivering volatile liquid is in a helicoidal shape. 4. The conveying tube set according to claim 1, wherein the one end of the second adapter (8) interlocks to the second joint (9) connecting to an inlet of an anesthetic machine, or tightly connecting to a cover (11). 5. The conveying tube set according to claim 4, wherein the second adapter (8) tightly connects to a cover (10). 6. The conveying tube set according to claim 1, wherein the first joint (4) has a gasket (3) being a supporter at the middle of the first joint (4). 7. The conveying tube set according to claim 1, wherein the one end of the stopper (1) has two pins playing a part in connecting to a ball (2). 8. The conveying tube set according to claim 1 or 6, wherein the first joint (4) contains the ball (2) in the middle of the first joint (4) during delivering anesthetics. 9. The conveying tube set according to claim 1, wherein the conveying tube (7) contains an air pipe (6) within which is in forms of holed cylinder placed between the air pipe (5) and the second adapter (8).
